description: Data analyst who collects, processes, and analyzes data to help organizations make informed business decisions. Transforms raw data into actionable insights through statistical analysis, data visualization, and reporting. Works with cross-functional teams to identify trends, measure performance, and drive data-driven strategy.

responsibilities: Clean and preprocess raw data from various sources
Create basic dashboards and reports in BI tools
Write SQL queries to extract and aggregate data
Perform exploratory data analysis to identify trends
Document data sources, methodologies, and definitions
Support senior analysts with ad-hoc data requests
Own end-to-end analysis for assigned business verticals
Design and maintain automated reporting pipelines
Conduct A/B test analysis and statistical significance testing
Present insights and recommendations to stakeholders
Build predictive models using regression and classification
Collaborate with data engineering on data quality improvements
Mentor junior analysts on analysis techniques
requirements: Advanced SQL (window functions, CTEs, query optimization)

responsibilities: Define analytics strategy and KPIs for business units
Lead data-driven product decisions with actionable recommendations
Design complex experiments and causal inference studies
Build dashboards used by executive leadership for decision making
Establish data quality standards and governance practices
Drive adoption of data literacy across the organization
Manage stakeholder relationships and prioritize analytics roadmap

day_to_day: Morning standup with data team — discuss ongoing analysis, blockers, new requests
Write and optimize SQL queries for data extraction from data warehouse (BigQuery/Snowflake/Redshift)
Build and update Tableau/Looker dashboards for business stakeholders
Conduct ad-hoc analysis — investigate metric anomalies, answer business questions
Present findings to stakeholders with clear data storytelling and actionable recommendations
Clean incoming data — handle missing values, outliers, data type inconsistencies
Automate recurring reports using Python scripts or scheduled SQL queries
Collaborate with data engineers on data pipeline requirements and quality checks
Document analysis methodologies, metric definitions, and data sources in knowledge base
Self-learning — study new analysis techniques, tools, or domain-specific knowledge

analysis_methodologies.description: What happened? Summarize historical data to understand past performance.
Why did it happen? Drill down to understand root causes of outcomes.
What will happen? Use historical data to forecast future outcomes.
What should we do? Recommend actions based on data insights.

common_issues.symptom: Reported metrics don't match across dashboards. Duplicate records. Missing values skew analysis.
common_issues.root_cause: No data validation in source systems. Multiple teams define same metric differently. ETL pipeline has gaps.
common_issues.fix: Implement data quality checks at pipeline level. Create single source of truth for metric definitions. Set up automated data validation alerts.
common_issues.prevention: Data governance framework. Metric dictionary maintained and versioned. Regular data audits.

common_issues.symptom: Business teams question dashboard numbers. Decisions delayed due to data credibility concerns.
common_issues.root_cause: Inconsistent metrics, unexplained data anomalies, lack of transparency in methodology.
common_issues.fix: Add documentation to dashboards explaining data sources and methodology. Show data recency and completeness indicators. Set up stakeholder review process.
common_issues.prevention: Proactive data quality monitoring. Clear communication of data limitations. Build stakeholder relationships through regular check-ins.

common_issues.symptom: Dashboards have 50+ metrics. Stakeholders don't know what to focus on. No clear north star metric.
common_issues.root_cause: No prioritization of metrics. Every stakeholder request is added. No metric hierarchy.
common_issues.fix: Define 1-3 north star metrics per business unit. Create metric hierarchy (input vs output metrics). Archive unused dashboard widgets.
common_issues.prevention: Structured request intake process. Regular dashboard audit and cleanup. Educate stakeholders on metric prioritization.

industry_standards: SQL as the lingua franca of data — every analyst must be proficient
Data-driven decision making framework — define metric, measure, analyze, recommend, implement, measure again
A/B testing best practices — randomized assignment, adequate sample size, statistical significance (p < 0.05)
Metric hierarchy — north star → key results → input metrics → diagnostic metrics
Dashboard design principles — most important metric first, consistent layout, clear context and period comparisons
Data documentation — every metric must have a definition, source, refresh cadence, and owner
Version control for analysis — notebooks and SQL queries in Git
Reproducible analysis — seed random states, document steps, share code not just screenshots

skill_areas.name: SQL & Data Manipulation
skills: Complex SQL queries (CTEs, window functions, subqueries)

project_types.name: User Retention Analysis
project_types.approach: Cohort analysis of user retention by signup month, identify drop-off points in user journey, build churn prediction model, recommend interventions
deliverables: Churn prediction model with feature importance

project_types.name: Revenue Growth Analysis
project_types.approach: Analyze revenue trends by product line, customer segment, and geography. Identify highest LTV customer segments. Build revenue forecasting model.

project_types.name: Marketing Campaign Attribution
project_types.approach: Build multi-touch attribution model, analyze ROI by marketing channel, optimize budget allocation based on conversion data

project_types.name: Product Feature Adoption Analysis
project_types.approach: Track feature adoption metrics, identify sticky vs ignored features, analyze user segments that adopt specific features, recommend feature improvements
deliverables: User segment analysis by feature usage
Product improvement recommendations based on usage data
